title: Tinted Bricks
body:
![header](https://i.imgur.com/ICHd1Y3.png)



Have you ever wished you had more color choices for brick?

Well wish no longer.



![overview](https://i.imgur.com/pAodOtH.png)

With Tinted Bricks your color choices just got expanded.

Bricks now come in not just the vanilla color but another 72 color choices.

Enjoy!

All Recipes can be viewed with JEI!



You may freely use this and any of my other mods in modpacks.
